testcase.name: test_session_alias_works
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_workspaces_security.py:109: in test_session_alias_works assert r.status_code == 200, r.text E AssertionError: {"detail":"Method Not Allowed"} E assert 405 == 200 E + where 405 = <Response [405]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_x_workspace_id_from_other_user_blocked_on_transactions

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 403 for cross-user workspace, got 200: [] assert 200 == 403 + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_workspaces_security.py:368: in test_x_workspace_id_from_other_user_blocked_on_transactions assert r.status_code == 403, ( E AssertionError: Expected 403 for cross-user workspace, got 200: [] E assert 200 == 403 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_revoke_all_sessions_invalidates_current
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_workspaces_security.py:394: in test_revoke_all_sessions_invalidates_current assert post.status_code == 401, ( E AssertionError: Expected 401 after revoke-all-sessions, got 200: {"user_id":"u_TEST_WS_SEC_d466a0_REV_3cdaee22","email":"test_test_ws_sec_d466a0_rev@example.com","name":"Test REV","picture":"","session_version":1,"created_at":"2026-05-19T14:28:23.923000"} E assert 200 == 401 E + where 200 = <Response [200]>.status_code
